title: Nursery Rhyme. DCVII. Local.
content:
My father and mother,
        My uncle and aunt,
        Be all gone to Norton,
        But little Jack and I.

        A little bit of powdered beef,
        And a great net of cabbage,
        The best meal I have had to-day,
        Is a good bowl of porridge.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. DCVII. Local."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
